arts.ttl: What do Man Utd and Spurs need in their final Europa League match?
arts.sum: The stakes in the final Europa League matches on Thursday at 20:00 GMT are identical to that of the UEFA Champions League. Sitting in fourth place with 15 points, Ruben Amorim ’s side have a two-point gap above the playoff places, meaning a draw at Romanian team FCSB could be enough to secure a top-eight spot, depending on results elsewhere.

arts.sum: The Swiss shot-stopper could be in demand this summer, with both Premier League clubs keen to strength between the sticks amid growing pressure on Robert Sanchez and Andre Onana

arts.ttl: Manchester United set to sign “powerhouse on a football field” – Coach makes him sound like force of nature
arts.sum: Incoming Manchester United signing Patrick Dorgu is a “powerhouse on a football field” and likely to impress at Old Trafford. That’s according to his U21t coach Steffen Höjer, via Tipsbladet, who believes massively in the versatile full-back’s potential as he gets set to join Manchester United. arts.ttl: Romano announces DELAY to Man Utd transfer amid fears of deal COLLAPSE
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that the transfer that will take Patrick Dorgu from Lecce to Manchester United has been delayed. Romano announces DELAY to Man Utd transfer amid fears of deal COLLAPSE

arts.ttl: Lecce asking for final allowances on Patrick Dorgu – Reasons why Manchester United transfer may be delayed
arts.sum: Two days ago, multiple claims from Italy stated Manchester United and Lecce have come to an agreement for Patrick Dorgu’s transfer. On Wednesday, Italian journalist Gianluca Di Marzio reported the Red Devils were sorting out the last details of the operation.
